name: Light Pill #19 - The Heart Listener
description: The Heart Listener - A glowing capsule that reveals the silent music of emotions and teaches how to hear what hearts cannot speak. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Soft rose-colored velvet with embroidered heartbeats
Rose crystal stethoscope that hears emotional frequencies
Silent velvet slippers that feel emotional vibrations
Chamber of floating heart-shaped crystals and soft light
The heart speaks in a language older than words, and its truth resonates in the spaces between breaths.

You must listen to three heartbeats without judgment - one filled with joy, one heavy with sorrow, and one trembling with fear. Then you must find the silent space where all three rhythms meet in harmony.
Must be taken with hand over heart

properties.ai_prompt: Tender fashion editorial of The Heart Listener in a chamber of floating heart-shaped crystals, wearing soft rose-colored velvet with embroidered heartbeat patterns, using a rose crystal stethoscope to listen to emotional frequencies. Rose Quartz aura with Gentle Pulse energy, silent velvet slippers, cinematic lighting that creates soft glows and gentle shadows, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible emotional energy patterns and crystalline heart shapes.
